name: Favorite Potato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Combine flour and salt; make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. Blend together egg, mashed potatoes, potato water, honey, and oil.
4. Add baking soda and yogurt or buttermilk to the egg mixture.
5. Pour the combination into the well of the flour and salt; mix thoroughly.
6. Turn onto lightly floured surface and knead for 10 minutes.
7. Cover and let rise for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, until a 1/2-inch hole in dough made with a wet fingertip remains. If the hole fills in slightly, give the dough more time to rise.
8. Gently deflate the dough. Let rest for 10 minutes.
9. Shape into loaves and let rise until almost doubles (about 45 minutes).
10. Bake at 350°F for approximately 1 hour.
